features.name: Micro Patch route
features.summary: Simple local style/copy changes skip heavy workflows.

features.name: Route Guard
features.summary: Verifies actual diff still fits selected route.
features.user_value: Fast routes cannot silently expand into risky changes.

features.name: Explicit Subagent Activation
features.summary: Adds project-scoped agents and automatic subagent selection.
features.user_value: Users do not need to memorize subagent prompts.

features.name: Model Routing Strategy
features.summary: Uses fast mini models for read-only scouts and stronger models for risky implementation/review.

features.name: Feature Matrix
features.user_value: Users can see what is new without reading diffs.

features.name: Safe Migration Plan
features.summary: Plans governance-file migrations without overwriting local changes.

features.name: Install Manifest Ledger
features.summary: Tracks generated files, hashes, and upgrade policies.
features.user_value: Upgrade tools can distinguish unchanged, modified, missing, and custom files.

features.name: Clean Init Profile
features.summary: Initializes target projects with project-owned governance files only; plugin-global .codex agents/prompts/config stay in the plugin unless explicitly requested.
features.user_value: Projects stay clean and plugin upgrades are less noisy.

features.name: Project Hygiene Doctor
features.summary: Detects plugin-global assets that were copied into target projects and quarantines safe generated files without deleting custom project overrides.
features.user_value: Users can repair initialized projects and reduce upgrade conflicts.

features.name: Plugin Repository Self-Inspection
features.summary: Treats the Project Governor plugin repository itself as clean when --project matches --plugin-root, including its own .codex agents, prompts, and config.
features.user_value: Plugin maintainers can run the hygiene doctor in this source repository without false target-project cleanup warnings.

features.name: Copied Plugin Source Detection
features.summary: Keeps flagging copied plugin metadata and skills in downstream projects when they are not the configured plugin root.
features.user_value: Target-project cleanup still catches accidental plugin-source leaks while the plugin repository can self-govern.

features.name: Clean Reinstall Manager
features.summary: Adds a skill and deterministic helpers for user-level plugin reinstall, governed-project discovery, and clean project refresh.
features.user_value: Users can reinstall the plugin and refresh initialized projects without copying plugin-global assets or overwriting project customizations.

features.name: Project refresh trash/quarantine
features.summary: Moves plugin-global noise to .project-governor/trash/<timestamp>/ instead of deleting it.
features.user_value: Projects can be cleaned while preserving recoverability.
